---
title: "Federal Data Workshops: the Bureau of Labor Statistics"
source: "Workshop Material"
author: "William Duncan"
institution: "University of Kansas"
competency: [Programming Skills, Data Wrangling]
tech-lang: [STATA]
main-format: [Code]
toc: true
toc-title: "On this page"
---

## Material Description

This is the first session of the Federal Data Workshops hosted in Spring 2025, covering the Bureau of Labor Statistics.

## Module Materials

You can access the material [here](https://github.com/KansasData/Module/tree/main/ku_duncan_federal_labor)

This Material is under the [CC BY license](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/)
